s2.ptxt: Install the No. 5 synchronizer middle ring, No. 5 synchronizer ring outer, and synchronizer pull ring to the No. 5 synchronizer ring inner. Using a screwdriver, fix them with the snap ring.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 3 SYNCHROMESH SHIFTING KEY SPRING

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 3 synchromesh shifting key spring to the No. 3 transmission clutch hub.

atten3.ptxt: Align the projection of the shifting key spring with the No. 3 hole of the clutch hub.

s2.ptxt: Install the synchronizer ring set and No. 3 synchromesh shifting key spring to the No. 3 transmission clutch hub.

item.ptxt: Engage the shifting key spring claw to the center of the teeth of the synchronizer ring.
Align the projection of the shifting key spring with the hole of the No. 3 clutch hub.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT TRANSAXLE CASE COVER OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, install a new front transaxle case cover oil seal.
Coat the front transaxle case cover oil seal lip with MP grease.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DIFFERENTIAL CASE FRONT TAPERED ROLLER BEARING

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, install the front differential case front tapered roller bearing (outer race) to the front transaxle case.
Using SST and a press, install the front differential case front tapered roller bearing (inner race) to the front differential case.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DIFFERENTIAL CASE REAR TAPERED ROLLER BEARING

s2.ptxt: Install the front differential case shim rear.
Using SST and a hammer, install the front differential case rear tapered roller bearing (outer race).
Using SST and a press, install the front differential case rear tapered roller bearing (inner race).
Using SST and a hammer, install a transmission case oil seal to the manual transmission case.
Coat the transmission case oil seal lip with MP grease.
Using SST and a hammer, install the output shaft rear bearing (outer race) to the manual transmission case.
Coat the output shaft cover with MP grease, and install it to the manual transaxle case.

atten3.ptxt: Align the projection of the output shaft with the transmission groove.

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, install the output shaft front bearing (outer race).
Install the output shaft to the manual transaxle case.
Install the transmission case to the manual transaxle case with the 14 bolts.
Install the 3 bolts to the manual transaxle case.
Install the output shaft rear bearing case shim to the output shaft.
Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T45), install the bearing retainer rear to the manual transmission case with the 7 screws.
Turn the output shaft in both directions to make sure that it starts to turn smoothly.
Using a socket wrench and torque wrench, inspect the preload.
If preload is out of specification, select a proper output shaft rear bearing shim and adjust it.

atten4.ptxt: The preload of all the output shaft rear bearing shim varies in torque from about 0.04 to 0.06 N*m (0.408 to 0.612 kgf*cm, 0.35 to 0.53 in.*lbf).

s2.ptxt: Remove the output shaft rear set nut from the output shaft.
Using a "TORX" socket wrench (T45), remove the 7 screws and bearing retainer rear from the manual transmission case.
Remove the output shaft rear bearing shim from the output shaft.
Remove the 3 bolts.
Remove the 14 bolts and manual transmission case from the manual transaxle case.
Remove the output shaft assembly from the front manual transaxle case.
Install the differential case assembly to the manual transaxle case.
Install the 14 bolts and manual transmission case to the manual transaxle case.
Install the 3 bolts to the front manual transaxle case.
Turn the differential case in both directions to make sure that it starts to turn smoothly.
Using SST and a torque wrench, inspect preload.
If preload is out of specification, select a proper front differential case rear shim and adjust it.

atten4.ptxt: The preload of all the front differential case rear shims varies in torque from about 0.04 to 0.06 N*m (0.408 to 0.612 kgf*cm, 0.35 to 0.53 in.*lbf).

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 bolts.
Remove the 14 bolts and manual transmission case from the manual transaxle case.
Remove the differential case assembly from the manual transaxle case.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT TRANSAXLE CASE OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a hammer, install a new front transaxle case oil seal to the manual transaxle case.
Coat the lip of the front transaxle case oil seal with MP grease.
Coat the input shaft front bearing with gear oil.
Using SST and a hammer, install the oil seal to the manual transaxle case.
Install the manual transaxle case receiver to the manual transaxle case with the 3 bolts.
Coat the differential case tapered roller bearing with gear oil, and install the differential case assembly to the manual transaxle case.
Apply gear oil to each sliding part of the output shaft assembly.
Lift the differential case assembly with the output shaft assembly leaned, and install it to the manual transaxle case.
Apply gear oil to each sliding part of the input shaft assembly.
Install the input shaft assembly to the manual transaxle case while tilting the output shaft assembly.
Coat the No. 2 gear shift fork with gear oil, and install it to the input shaft assembly.
Install the No. 3 gear shift fork to the No. 3 gear shift fork shaft.
Using a brass bar and hammer, install the 2 shift fork shaft snap rings to the gear shift fork shaft.
Apply gear oil to each sliding part of the No. 3 gear shift fork shaft, and install it to the manual transaxle case.
Apply gear oil to each sliding part of the No. 1 gear shift fork, and install it to the output shaft assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 GEAR SHIFT FORK SHAFT

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 1 gear shift head to the No. 2 gear shift fork shaft.
Apply gear oil to each sliding part of the No. 2 gear shift fork shaft, and install it to the manual transaxle case.
Install the shift fork set bolt and shift head set bolt to the No. 1 gear shift head.
Using a magnetic finger, install the reverse shift fork roller to the reverse shift fork.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 GEAR SHIFT FORK SHAFT

s2.ptxt: Using a brass bar and hammer, install the shift fork shaft snap ring to the No. 1 shift fork shaft.
Install the No. 1 gear shift fork shaft to the manual transaxle case.
Install the shift fork set bolt to the No. 1 gear shift fork.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REVERSE SHIFT ARM BRACKET ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the reverse shift arm bracket assembly to the manual transaxle case with the 2 bolts.
Coat the reverse idler gear and reverse idler thrust washer with MP grease, and install them to the reverse idler gear shaft.
Install the reverse idler gear to the manual transaxle case.

atten4.ptxt: Align the mark of the reverse idler gear shaft with the hole of the bolt.

s2.ptxt: Clean the transmission magnet and install it to the manual transaxle case.
Install the No. 1 oil receiver pipe to the manual transmission case with the bolt.
Install the No. 2 oil receiver pipe to the manual transmission case with the bolt.
Install the transmission oil baffle and reverse restrict pin with the bolt.
Using a pin punch (φ 5 mm), install the slotted pin to the reverse restrict pin assembly.
Coat the reverse restrict pin plug with adhesive. Using a hexagon wrench (6 mm), install the manual transmission case.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Adhesive 1324, Three Bond 1324 or equivalent

s2.ptxt: Apply a bead of FIPG to the manual transmission case as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Install the manual transmission case within 10 minutes after applying FIPG.

s2.ptxt: Install the manual transmission case to the manual transaxle case with the 14 bolts.
Coat the 3 bolts with adhesive.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Adhesive 1324, Three Bond 1324 or equivalent

s2.ptxt: Install the 3 bolts to the manual transaxle case.
Install the clutch tube bracket with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REVERSE IDLER GEAR SHAFT BOLT

s2.ptxt: Coat the bolt with adhesive. Install a new gasket to the manual transmission case with the bolt.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Adhesive 1344, Three Bond 1344 or equivalent

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT FORK SHAFT SHAFT SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using a brass bar and hammer, install the shift fork shaft snap ring to the No. 1 gear shift fork shaft.
Using a brass bar and hammer, install the shift fork shaft snap ring to the No. 2 gear shift fork shaft.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INPUT SHAFT REAR BEARING SHAFT SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using a snap ring expander, install the input shaft rear bearing shaft snap ring.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL OUTPUT SHAFT REAR BEARING SHIM

s2.ptxt: Install the output shaft rear bearing shim to the output shaft.
Coat the rear bearing retainer with sealant and install it with a "TORX" wrench (T45).
Install a new output rear set nut to the output shaft.
Using SST, install the 5th driven gear to the output shaft.
Coat the 5th gear needle roller bearing with gear oil and install it to the input shaft.
Coat the 5th gear with gear oil and install it to the input shaft.
Using SST, install the No. 3 transmission clutch hub to the input shaft.

atten3.ptxt: Align the projection of the synchronizer ring with the hole of the 5th gear.

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 3 transmission hub sleeve and No. 3 gear shift fork to the No. 3 transmission clutch hub.
Coat the shift fork set bolt with adhesive and install it to the No. 3 gear shift fork.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Adhesive 1344, Three Bond 1344 or equivalent

s2.ptxt: Select a snap ring that will allow minimum axial play. Using a brass bar and a hammer, install the shaft snap ring.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL MANUAL TRANSMISSION OUTPUT SHAFT REAR SET NUT

s2.ptxt: Engage the 1st and 2nd gears simultaneously.
Install a new manual transmission output shaft rear set nut.
Using a chisel and a hammer, stake the manual transmission output shaft rear set nut.
Disengage the gears.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL MANUAL TRANSMISSION CASE COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Apply FIPG to the transaxle case cover sub-assembly as shown in the installation.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Seal Packing 1281, Three Bond 1281 or equivalent

atten3.ptxt: Install the part within 10 minutes after applying the packing material (FIPG).

s2.ptxt: Install the transmission case cover sub-assembly to the manual transaxle case with the 10 bolts.
Install the drain plug sub-assembly to the manual transmission case with a new gasket.
Install the manual transmission filler plug to the transaxle case with a new gasket.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT AND SELECT LEVER SHAFT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Coat the shift and select lever shaft assembly with gear oil, and install it to the manual transmission case.
Install the back-up light switch assembly to the manual transmission case with a new gasket.
Install the manual transmission breather plug to the manual transmission case.
Install the shift gate pin to the manual transmission case.
Install the lock ball assembly No. 1 to the manual transmission case.
Coat the 4 bolts with adhesive. Install a new gasket and the control shaft cover with the bolts.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Adhesive 1344, Three Bond 1344 or equivalent

s2.ptxt: Install the control shift lever with the shift outer lever lock pin to the shift and select lever shaft.
Install the spring washer with the nut.
Coat the 2 bolts with adhesive. Install the selecting bellcrank assembly to the manual transmission case with the bolts.

specitem.ptxt: Toyota Genuine Adhesive 1344, Three Bond 1344 or equivalent

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SPEEDOMETER DRIVEN HOLE COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install a new O-ring and the speedometer driven hole cover sub-assembly to the transmission case with the bolt.
Install the clutch release fork boot to the manual transaxle case.
Using a deep socket wrench, install the release fork support to the manual transaxle case.
Coat the clutch release bearing assembly with release hub grease, and install it to the clutch release fork sub-assembly.

specitem.ptxt: Part No. 08887-01806, Release Hub Grease or equivalent

s2.ptxt: Apply clutch spline grease to the input shaft spline.
Install the clutch release fork sub-assembly to the input shaft.
